description: You are a biology teacher creating an offline photo gallery for your students using three high-resolution wildlife photos located in /home/ga/Documents/wildlife_photos/: monarch_butterfly.jpg, red_eyed_tree_frog.jpg, and galapagos_tortoise.jpg. Create a lightweight HTML gallery at /home/ga/Documents/wildlife_gallery/index.html with a visible heading containing the exact text 'Wildlife Gallery'. The gallery must display thumbnails of the three images, resized so that neither width nor height exceeds 200 pixels while preserving aspect ratio, stored in /home/ga/Documents/wildlife_gallery/thumbs/ using the original filenames. Each thumbnail must be wrapped in a hyperlink that points to its corresponding high-resolution original image in the wildlife_photos directory.
